title: 1150 Pcs Pearl Beads, Round Beige Pearls Assorted Size Mixed Imitation Beads for Wedding Party Decoration Jewelry DIY Craft Making, 3/4/5/6/8/10/12 mm
features: 【Value Package】The package contains approximately 1150 pearl beads in sizes of 3mm, 4mm, 5mm, 6mm, 8mm, 10mm, 12mm
【Quality Material】Imitation pearls are made of premium plastic, delicate and smooth as true pearl, yet strong and light
【Convenient Use】Each pearl has a hole, just use thread to wear the pearls to form a beautiful work, no need to use glue
【Wide Application】These pearls can widely uesd in bracelet, necklace, dress decoration, jewelry accessories, gifts and other crafts
【WARNING】Since the package contains tiny parts, please be sure to keep the box out of the reach of children to prevent children from swallowing
description: Product Description You will receive 1150pcs beige pearl beads in 7 different size, enough quantity and various size can meet your daily use needs. The pearl beads are well designed with holes, easy to operate. Comes with a flower-shaped and clear plastic box, convenient to store and easy to carry. 7 Different Sizes: 3mm----650pieces 4mm----250pieces 5mm----150pieces 6mm----70pieces 8mm----20pieces 10mm----8pieces 12mm----5pieces You can string them up with rope or glue them on your crafts, convenient for use. Made of high quality plastic, sturdy and durable, can be used for a long time. Smooth surface and satin luster, can keep long-lasting effect and do not fade easily. Hair clips Can also be used for home or crafts decorations, photo props, beaded curtains, bridal bouquets, etc. Necklace Suitable for making all kinds of jewelry, necklaces, bracelets, earrings, anklets, etc. Earrings Best DIY tool for art crafts, you can do the DIY decorations with your children or friends to improve relationship.
